prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-HWC-ATCST-85X11-GRN Product Type: TEMPLATE_STENCIL Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Forensic Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool, 11x8.5 Inches Description: The ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool allows you to consistently record a crime scene drawing to scale with accuracy and precision. A crime scene drawing produced with a scale tool can provide more scrupulous information and details for police and security professionals and, ultimately aid in on-going investigation discovery.

The ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool helps to demonstrate placement and distances of and from objects in a crime scene in relation to the evidence obtained; it helps to simplify the drawing of difficult items found at a crime scene that may be confusing or inconclusive when offsite. The ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool also aids with a crime scene drawing by providing standardization and proportion.

The scale drawing template tool features a variety of helpful cutouts including human figures, furniture, plumbing and common, everyday items. The scales included are as follows: 0.25 inch equaling one foot and one inch equaling ten feet (1/4” = 1’; 1/10”=1’); scale rulers for each are included. By consistently using the scale and available cutouts, you can record and produce an accurate and precise crime scene drawing every time.

The ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool is made in the USA from durable but flexible plastic. The notebook-sized police scale drawing legend template tool can be carried on its own or is conveniently compatible with a standard three-hole punch ring binder for easy transportation and storage Search Terms: Crime scene csi crime scene investigation crime scene kitchen crime scene investigation crime scene equipment crime scene kit police police gear police equipment police gifts police officer gifts police accessories police stuff FBI cops CIA private Features: - SPECIALIZED POLICE TOOL: Field tested and designed with police and security professional input, the ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool allows you to record a crime scene drawing to scale with accuracy and precision - DRAWING BY SCALE: The ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool includes two convenient scale options; 0.25 inch equaling 1 foot and 1 inch equaling 10 feet; Scale rulers for both scales are included on the police scale drawing legend template tool - DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Made in the USA from durable but flexible plastic; the notebook sized police scale drawing legend template can be carried on its own or is compatible with a standard 3hole punch ring binder for easy transportation and storage when not in use - ADAPTABILITY: Designed for an assortment of different crime scenes, the ASR Federal Police Crime Scene Scale Drawing Legend Template Tool is useful for the record of everything from burglary to arson using the variety of provided human figure, furniture and common item cutouts - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Plastic; Color: Green; Made in USA; Size: 8.5 inches x 11 inches x 1 inch; 2.24 ounces; 3 hole punches included; Drawing paper or sketch pad not included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
